INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT (TIED AGENTS)

[L.S.370.14

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.14
INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT
(TIED AGENTS) REGULATIONS* *
1 ta’ Novembru, 2007
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 327 tal-2007, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 356 tal2009.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew imħassra bl-Avviż Legali 403 tal-2017.

1
